actionUnits.condition: Simulate XRGrabInteractable.m_Activated (MonoBehaviour fileID 1135932914521357561) persistent calls which include Gun.Shoot. Only invoke public no-arg method Gun.Shoot (MonoBehaviour fileID 8183513503680063775). Preconditions: shootState == Ready, remainingAmmunition > 0. Config: ammunition=10, fireRate=1.5, roundsPerShot=1, roundSpeed=100, maxRoundVariation=10. Expect: instantiate Laser prefab at GunPov, AudioManager.Play("Gun Fire"), remainingAmmunition--, shootState=Shooting then Ready after cooldown.
Repeat Shot #2 to validate fire cooldown gating (1/fireRate ~= 0.666s).
Repeat Shot #3.
Repeat Shot #4.
Repeat Shot #5.
Repeat Shot #6.
Repeat Shot #7.
Repeat Shot #8.
Repeat Shot #9 (ammunition should become 1 after this).

Shot #10 to deplete ammo and trigger automatic Reload() path inside Shoot(). Expect: text.SetText("Reloading"), AudioManager.Play("Reload"), shootState=Reloading then Ready after reloadTime=2.5s; remainingAmmunition reset to 10.
Post-auto-reload validation shot (#11). Expect normal firing again and remainingAmmunition decrements from full.
Invoke auxiliary event: MagazineInsert(). Currently no-op in code but ensures callable path executes.
Invoke auxiliary event: MagazineExit(). Currently no-op in code but ensures callable path executes.
Manual Reload() while Ready to cover explicit reload path. Expect: text 'Reloading', Audio 'Reload', shootState=Reloading then Ready after 2.5s, remainingAmmunition reset.
Post-manual-reload validation shot.

Laser is the projectile prefab instantiated by Gun.Shoot. Provided prefab info indicates Has_Rigidbody=false, but Gun.Shoot expects a Rigidbody on the spawned round (rb = spawnedRound.GetComponent<Rigidbody>()). To interact and validate projectile behavior, we need the Laser prefab's components (Collider/Rigidbody/MonoBehaviours with fileIDs and any public no-arg methods). Without this, we cannot validly perform Transform (requires Rigidbody) or Trigger method calls.

actionUnits.condition: Attack event via proximity. Ensure GameObject.Find("Camera Offset") (id: 4940586919770313183) resolves so EnemyAi.player is set in Awake. After moving Enemy Type 5 to approx (0,0,0), it should be within both sightRange and attackRange for all attached EnemyAi MonoBehaviours (guid: 16000b3396174ab49b4983590de64f34). Component configs: [614338935, 1888436447, 1673477538] sightRange=8, attackRange=6, timeBetweenAttacks=0.5, forceforward=10, health=10; [1640000274, 1646766445] sightRange=10, attackRange=7, timeBetweenAttacks=0.75, forceforward=15, health=5. Expected automatic behavior during this hold: agent stops and faces player, AudioManager.Play("Gun Fire"), projectile instantiated at Attackpoint (fileID: 2913934810850566424) with forward/up forces, alreadyAttacked set then auto-reset via Invoke after timeBetweenAttacks.

Chase event via visibility only. At ~8 units from Camera Offset the enemy should be outside attackRange (max 7) but within sightRange (min 8) for EnemyAi components [614338935, 1888436447, 1673477538, 1640000274, 1646766445]. Expected automatic behavior: EnemyAi.ChasePlayer path runs, NavMeshAgent.SetDestination(player.position), LookAt constrained to yaw.

Patrol event via no visibility. At ~38+ units from Camera Offset the enemy should be outside both sightRange and attackRange for all EnemyAi components [614338935, 1888436447, 1673477538, 1640000274, 1646766445]. Expected automatic behavior: Patroling() runs, SearchWalkPoint() may set walkPoint when Raycast on whatIsGround (m_Bits 2048) succeeds, NavMeshAgent.SetDestination(walkPoint) until within 1f, then walkPointSet=false.

Force AttackPlayer by placing the player within both sightRange and attackRange near (0,0,0). EnemyAi settings in-scene (script guid: 16000b3396174ab49b4983590de64f34) — components: [614338935, 1888436447, 1673477538] sightRange=8, attackRange=6, timeBetweenAttacks=0.5, forceforward=10, health=10; [1640000274, 1646766445] sightRange=10, attackRange=7, timeBetweenAttacks=0.75, forceforward=15, health=5. Patroling by being outside both ranges for all EnemyAi components. Expected: SearchWalkPoint() picks random walkPoint on whatIsGround (m_Bits: 2048); NavMeshAgent.SetDestination(walkPoint) until within 1f then walkPointSet=false.

actionUnits.condition: MonoBehaviour fileID 4460531382388078979 (guid: 28d50a2d56ade1341ae8d933ebdfbe0c) is PauseMenu.PauseMenu attached to XR Rig (fileID: 4940586920907814101). MonoBehaviour fileID 4460531382388078979 (PauseMenu.PauseMenu). Call Hide() to resume the game (Time.timeScale=1), disable rays, enable locomotion, and due to RightTeleport=true, enable TeleportManagzerRight while keeping Pausemenu inactive.
